name: o-matic-wordpress-factory
description: Host-aware WordPress and Elementor MCP plugin with bundled brand, build, writing, and visual skills.

canonical_format.contract: The MCP servers are the canonical WordPress and Elementor tool surfaces. Bundled SKILL.md files are canonical prompt contracts and must not fork per platform.

mcp_hosts.notes: Full operation requires an MCP-capable host that can launch the WordPress and Elementor connector servers and provide project credentials or profile config.

prompt_only_hosts.notes: Prompt-only hosts can load bundled skills as behavior instructions, but cannot perform WordPress or Elementor actions unless connected through an external MCP bridge or separate tool adapter.

claude.notes: Claude Code plugin manifest starts MCP servers and loads bundled skills.

codex.notes: Codex plugin manifest loads skills and .mcp.json starts the MCP servers.

cowork.notes: Use the same server entry points with explicit WordPress or Elementor environment variables/profile config.

google.notes: Use a bundled SKILL.md body as the system instruction for planning/review behavior. No site tools are available without an MCP bridge.

ollama.notes: Build a Modelfile from a bundled SKILL.md for local prompt behavior. No site tools are available unless the local app wraps Ollama with MCP/tool calls.

generic.notes: Load the selected SKILL.md as a system/developer instruction. Treat WordPress and Elementor actions as unavailable unless the runtime provides matching tools.
